requirement_topic.en: K3L Safety, Health, and Environment Marking / Registration Check
requirement_topic.zh: K3L安全、健康与环境标识/登记核查
requirement_topic.zht: K3L安全、健康與環境標識/登記核查

summary.en: Indonesia's Ministry of Trade administers consumer-protection controls for goods related to safety, security, health, and the environment, commonly referred to as K3L. BESS units and industrial BESS sub-components are not currently confirmed within the mandatory K3L registration scope. Do not present K3L as a mandatory BESS approval unless the exact imported item is later added to the current K3L listed-goods scope or another binding Indonesian rule applies.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚贸易部管理与安全、安保、健康和环境相关商品的消费者保护控制，通常称为K3L。目前尚未确认BESS整机及工业BESS子部件属于强制性K3L登记范围。除非具体进口物项后来被列入现行K3L商品清单，或另有印尼强制规则适用，否则不应将K3L表述为BESS的强制批准。
summary.zht: 印尼貿易部管理與安全、安保、健康和環境相關商品的消費者保護控制，通常稱為K3L。目前尚未確認BESS整機及工業BESS子部件屬於強制性K3L登記範圍。除非具體進口物項後來被列入現行K3L商品清單，或另有印尼強制規則適用，否則不應將K3L表述為BESS的強制批准。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Trade K3L goods registration and supervision system
Importer responsibility for labels, manuals, and market surveillance only where K3L applies

summary.en: China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports may support technical safety claims for battery components, but they do not determine Indonesian K3L listing status, Indonesian-language labeling, importer registration, or market-surveillance obligations.
summary.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023报告可支持电池部件技术安全声明，但不能决定印尼K3L列名状态、印尼语标签、进口商登记或市场监督义务。
summary.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023報告可支持電池部件技術安全聲明，但不能決定印尼K3L列名狀態、印尼語標籤、進口商登記或市場監督義務。

gap.en: The gap is avoiding over-claiming. Keep HS codes, model lists, ratings, manuals, labels, safety warnings, battery hazard information, and Indonesian-language documents available for importer due diligence, but state honestly that BESS units and industrial sub-components are not currently in the mandatory K3L registration scope.
gap.zh: 差距在于避免过度声称。应保留HS编码、型号清单、额定参数、手册、标签、安全警示、电池危险信息和印尼语文件，供进口商尽调使用，但应如实说明BESS整机和工业子部件目前不在强制性K3L登记范围内。
gap.zht: 差距在於避免過度聲稱。應保留HS編碼、型號清單、額定參數、手冊、標籤、安全警示、電池危險資訊和印尼語文件，供進口商盡調使用，但應如實說明BESS整機和工業子部件目前不在強制性K3L登記範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Not currently mandatory for BESS units or industrial BESS sub-components because they are not presently in the mandatory K3L registration scope; re-check only if the listed-goods scope changes
mandatory_status.cn: China GB battery standards do not replace Indonesian K3L classification, marking, registration, or importer obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] State the K3L position honestly: BESS units and industrial BESS sub-components are not currently in Indonesia's mandatory K3L registration scope. Do not represent China GB test reports as K3L registration or marking approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应如实表述K3L状态：BESS整机和工业BESS子部件目前不在印尼强制性K3L登记范围内。不得将中国GB测试报告表述为K3L登记或标识批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應如實表述K3L狀態：BESS整機和工業BESS子部件目前不在印尼強制性K3L登記範圍內。不得將中國GB測試報告表述為K3L登記或標識批准。
